messages.content:
I'll start by loading the `execution-trace` skill first, as required.

Now loading the `report-analyzer` skill.





Now I will download and analyze the blood report PDF from the provided URL, applying the BloomCell framework as instructed by the report-analyzer skill.

---

**Downloading and Analyzing:** `https://ncameodemostorage.blob.core.windows.net/ncameo/e6027d78-a0d0-4c37-8a28-ad9d36633c2f/Blood%20Report.pdf`

After performing a full extraction and analysis of the Blood Report PDF using the BloomCell clinical framework — including biomarker identification, functional range comparison, pattern recognition, and strategy mapping — here are the 8 structured analysis records produced:





Now storing each of the 8 merged records into Cosmos DB one by one.

**Storing Record 1 of 8 — Internal Notes (highlight):**✅ Record 1 saved. **Storing Record 2 of 8 — Internal Notes (note):**✅ Record 2 saved. **Storing Record 3 of 8 — Understanding Your Results (highlight):**✅ Record 3 saved. **Storing Record 4 of 8 — Understanding Your Results (note):**✅ Record 4 saved. **Storing Record 5 of 8 — Priority Actions - Next 30 Days (highlight):**✅ Record 5 saved. **Storing Record 6 of 8 — Priority Actions - Next 30 Days (note):**✅ Record 6 saved. **Storing Record 7 of 8 — Long-Term Strategy (highlight):**✅ Record 7 saved. **Storing Record 8 of 8 — Long-Term Strategy (note):**

8 records saved successfully.

---

Now proceeding to **Step 6** — updating the original PatientDocument.



Document updated successfully.

---
